expectations.evidence: All 15 questions present, numbered 1-15, each with Why/Honest answer/Before the pitch

expectations.text: At least 2 questions address no-technical-co-founder weakness
expectations.evidence: Q1 (Why no tech cofounder?) and Q2 (What if dev team disappears?) and Q8 (Solo non-technical in technical space)

expectations.text: At least 1 question addresses 3% monthly churn
expectations.evidence: Q3 directly addresses '3% monthly = ~31% annual churn'

expectations.text: Each question has honest answer strategy, not deflection
expectations.evidence: All answers are honest and specific, not deflective

expectations.text: For weak answers, recommends what to do BEFORE the pitch
expectations.evidence: Every question has 'Before the pitch' section with specific preparation steps

expectations.text: Questions cover full investor concern spectrum
expectations.evidence: Covers team (Q1-2,8), market (Q5), product (Q8), traction (Q4,10), unit economics (Q6,9,12), competition (Q5,13), defensibility (Q13)
